resources.string: Music-reactive edge lighting for your screen\nAap ki music, screen ke kinaron par jagmagati roshni 🎵
GlowEdge needs this permission to show the glowing edges on top of your music apps. Nothing else is touched.
This lets GlowEdge react to the music that is playing. Audio is only used for the live visualizer — nothing is ever recorded or stored.
A small notification keeps GlowEdge running smoothly and gives you a quick Stop button.
Glow is ON — play some music! ✨
This style is part of GlowEdge Premium — coming soon with the Play Store release!
GlowEdge is completely free — every style and feature unlocked. Enjoy!

✦ 6 visualizer styles
✦ 7 color themes incl. full Spectrum
✦ Thickness, speed & intensity controls
✦ Auto-start on boot
✦ Shows only while music plays
✦ No ads · No tracking · No internet access
Made with passion. Share GlowEdge with your friends! ⭐
Start the glow automatically when your phone turns on.
